data.name: 實力單身
data.detailed_description:
🚅 Add in WishList🚅


關於此遊戲

超過十組動態插圖，全中文語音演出！


【故事簡介】
家傳神秘的「優秀費洛蒙」，會使人發情變成癡女，瘋狂地想找你交配。你受夠了這種詛咒，決定偽裝成鋼鐵直男──面對女神級的追求者，你是否能靠實力保持單身呢？


【遊戲系統】
  • 限時生存：為了純愛結局全速疾走，被抓到就會喪失貞操！
  • 收集模式：女人，你擋到我玩遊戲了！收集所有遊戲機，憑實力單身。
  • 解鎖劇情：利用關卡收集到的金幣，解鎖特殊劇情


【人物介紹】
紅薇



娛樂大亨的千金，除了精通演戲、舞蹈、模特工作外，學校的表現也十分出色，擁有高人氣。十分清楚自己的女性魅力，加上大辣辣敢愛敢恨的個性，常將男性玩弄於股掌之間。

白琳



學生會長，以優異的表現在校內擁有高人氣。雖然總帶著溫柔的微笑，但被誇讚時卻會出現毒舌屬性，其兇殘程度可以用微笑殺人。不過也聽說有特殊愛好者樂此不疲。



珂珂



你專屬的女僕長，世世代代服侍你的家庭。工作能力強，有自信成為你最完美的左右手。雖然溫文儒雅，偶爾卻也用自己的特殊身分跟你講幹話，有著不傷大雅的淘氣的一面。

data.short_description: 癡女、逆推、逃亡！被抓到就會喪失貞操，散發催情費洛蒙的你，為了純愛結局全速疾走！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4 equivalent or above
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce 9600 GS, Radeon HD4000
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 3.60GHz equivalent or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 260, Radeon HD 5770
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Single By Choice
data.detailed_description:
🚅 Add in WishList🚅


About the Game

Over ten sets of dynamic, animated illustrations!


—-Story Introduction—-

You’ve inherited your family’s mysterious “Elegant Pheromones”, which give any women who breathe them in the insatiable desire to mate with you! Frankly, you’ve had enough of this curse, and have made it your mission to resist their advances and remain a permanent virgin... but do you really have what it takes to fend them off and stay single?

—-Game Mechanics—-

  • Time-limited Escapes: Get away from your female pursuers before time runs out so you can save yourself for true love! Be careful, because if you’re caught even once, there's no getting that chastity back!
  • Collectibles: Girls just get in the way of gaming time, amiright!? Collect all the consoles you can find so you can stay a virgin gamer... forever!
  • Unlockable Scenes: Use the coins you get from completing levels to unlock special story content.

—-Characters—-

Rose: The famous daughter of a rich entertainment tycoon. Apart from being proficient in acting, dancing, and modeling, Rose is also top of her class at school. She’s incredibly popular and perfectly aware of her own feminine charms, often using them to toy with men.



Lily: Student council president, Lily excels in school and is very popular for it. You’ll usually catch her with a smile, but be careful—Lily hates compliments! Say anything nice about her and those pearly whites will be absolutely dripping with venom! That said, I’ve heard there are some guys who actually like when Lily scolds them…




Coco: Your very own maid, she’s been with your family for generations. She works hard and has made herself a very capable right-hand woman. Despite her refined demeanor, however, Coco often gets off on teasing you—-without crossing any lines, of course.

data.short_description: You've inherited your family's super-strong pheromones, and now all the girls are after you... Too bad you want to stay a virgin! Now quick, run for your life or lose your chastity... forever!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • Processor: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4 equivalent or above
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Geforce 9600 GS, Radeon HD4000
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel Core 3.60GHz equivalent or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 260, Radeon HD 5770
